# W30T3 Implementation Plan

## Task Goal

Document every public Xenon type, trait, function, and method with complete item-level doc comments, including required `# Errors`, `# Panics`, `# Safety`, and `# Examples` sections. This task turns the design documents into a complete public API reference.

## Related Design Documents

- `design/29-documentation.md` ┬¦1.1-┬¦1.2
- `design/29-documentation.md` ┬¦5.2-┬¦5.6
- `design/29-documentation.md` ┬¦5.10.2-┬¦5.12.4
- `design/29-documentation.md` ┬¦7.1-┬¦7.2
- `design/29-documentation.md` ┬¦8.2-┬¦8.7
- `design/29-documentation.md` ┬¦9.1-┬¦9.2
- `design/28-tests.md` ┬¦8.22, tolerance semantics that item docs must cite correctly
- `design/00-coding.md` ┬¦5.1-┬¦5.4, error and panic behavior conventions

## Dependencies

- W30T2

## Files to Create/Modify

- all public-item source files under `src/`, including but not limited to:
- `src/tensor/mod.rs`, `src/tensor/aliases.rs`, `src/tensor/construct.rs`, `src/tensor/impls.rs`
- `src/dimension/mod.rs`, `src/dimension/static.rs`, `src/dimension/dynamic.rs`, `src/dimension/into.rs`, `src/dimension/axes.rs`
- `src/element/mod.rs`, `src/element/numeric.rs`, `src/element/real.rs`, `src/element/complex.rs`, `src/element/primitives.rs`
- `src/storage/mod.rs`, `src/storage/owned.rs`, `src/storage/view.rs`, `src/storage/viewmut.rs`, `src/storage/arc.rs`, `src/storage/alloc.rs`
- `src/layout/flags.rs`, `src/layout/strides.rs`, `src/layout/contiguous.rs`
- `src/math/*.rs`, `src/reduction/*.rs`, `src/matrix/*.rs`, `src/broadcast/*.rs`, `src/shape/*.rs`, `src/index/*.rs`, `src/construct/*.rs`, `src/convert/*.rs`, `src/set/*.rs`, `src/format/*.rs`, `src/ffi/*.rs`, `src/workspace/*.rs`, `src/error.rs`, `src/prelude.rs`

## Implementation Details

### Required documentation sections

Per `design/29-documentation.md` ┬¦5.4.2:

- `# Arguments` for methods with two or more parameters
- `# Returns` when the return value is not obvious
- `# Errors` for all `Result`-returning APIs
- `# Panics` for panicking functions or panic sugar entry points
- `# Safety` for every `unsafe fn`
- `# Examples` for all key APIs
- `# See Also` when related APIs exist

### Mandatory location groups

Use the grouped task list from `design/29-documentation.md` ┬¦7 as the item-level audit order:

- tensor docs: `TensorBase`, `Tensor`, `TensorView`, `TensorViewMut`, `ArcTensor`
- dimension docs: `Ix0` through `Ix6`, `IxDyn`, `Dimension`
- element docs: `Element`, `Numeric`, `RealScalar`, `ComplexScalar`
- storage docs: `Owned`, `ViewRepr`, `ViewMutRepr`, `ArcRepr`, `Storage`, `StorageMut`
- math docs: element-wise arithmetic and math functions, including tolerance notes
- reduction and matrix docs: `sum`, `sum_axis`, `dot`
- broadcast and shape docs: `broadcast_shape`, `broadcast_to`, `transpose`
- construct and set docs: `zeros`, `ones`, `eye`, `from_shape_vec`, `unique`
- ffi, workspace, and error docs: raw-parts constructors, export helpers, workspace guards, `XenonError`
- iter, convert, format, and overload docs: iterator entry points, `cast`, formatting APIs, operator behavior notes

### Unsafe API checklist

Maintain the unsafe-function checklist from `design/29-documentation.md` ┬¦7.1 for every public `unsafe fn`, especially:

- `from_raw_parts*`
- `from_raw_parts_mut`
- `from_raw_parts_owned`
- workspace `assume_init_*` APIs

Each `# Safety` section must cover aliasing, lifetime or provenance, initialization, bounds, and overflow or layout preconditions.

### Example snippet expectations

Key doctest targets should include compact runnable examples for:

- constructors, indexing and slicing, transpose, broadcast, math, reduction, dot, cast, FFI export or import, operator overloads, `clip`, `fill`, workspace usage, and formatting

## Test Plan

- `RUSTDOCFLAGS="-D warnings" cargo doc --all-features --no-deps`
- `cargo clippy --all-features -- -D clippy::missing_errors_doc -D clippy::missing_panics_doc -D clippy::missing_safety_doc`
- `cargo test --doc --all-features`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Every public item has a doc comment
- [ ] Every public `unsafe fn` has a complete `# Safety` section based on the documented checklist
- [ ] All key APIs have runnable doctests or cross-reference to a runnable example where appropriate
- [ ] Result-returning, panicking, and operator-overload APIs include the right error and panic notes
- [ ] Tolerance notes for cross-path and math-function behavior align with `ķ£Ćµ▒éĶ»┤µśÄõ╣” ┬¦28.3` via `design/28-tests.md`

## Development Workflow

1. Audit public items module by module, starting with tensor, dimension, element, and storage.
2. Add required section headings before writing examples so structure stays uniform.
3. Document all unsafe APIs with the checklist from `design/29-documentation.md` ┬¦7.1.
4. Add doctests for the key API families.
5. Run rustdoc, clippy doc-section gates, and doctests before moving to standalone examples.
